description: Static core routing capabilities for Skill Routing Kit v1.

capabilities.name: Skill Router
capabilities.use_when: Use when diagnosing skill or plugin routing, hit rate, registry freshness, why a skill did not trigger, or which capability should handle a request.
avoid_when: Do not use for ordinary task execution when a concrete domain skill clearly applies.
examples: Why did this skill not trigger?
Which skill should handle this request?

capabilities.name: Superpowers: Using Superpowers
capabilities.use_when: Use at conversation start or when deciding whether a process skill applies.
avoid_when: Do not use inside a delegated subagent task.
examples: Which skill should I use before starting this task?

capabilities.name: Superpowers: Brainstorming
capabilities.use_when: Use before creative feature work, product ideas, new components, or behavior changes.
avoid_when: Do not use for direct factual answers or routine command execution.
examples: Help me shape this product idea.

capabilities.name: Superpowers: Systematic Debugging
capabilities.use_when: Use for bugs, failing tests, unexpected behavior, regressions, or unclear failures.
avoid_when: Do not use for purely conceptual explanations with no failure to investigate.

capabilities.name: Superpowers: Writing Plans
capabilities.use_when: Use when a multi-step implementation plan is needed before touching code.
avoid_when: Do not use for tiny one-line changes or direct answers.

capabilities.name: Superpowers: Test Driven Development
capabilities.use_when: Use when implementing a feature or bug fix where tests can express behavior first.
avoid_when: Do not use when tests are impossible and user asks for a quick exploratory answer.
examples: Add this feature with tests first.

capabilities.name: Superpowers: Verification Before Completion
capabilities.use_when: Use before claiming work is complete, fixed, or passing.
avoid_when: Do not use for pure discussion with no completed work.
examples: Verify before saying this is done.

capabilities.name: Subagent Orchestration
capabilities.use_when: Use for long-running, multi-agent, handoff-sensitive, tool-policy-sensitive, or artifact-consistency-heavy work.
avoid_when: Do not use for ordinary single-agent tasks or simple local edits.
examples: Arrange multiple agents to review this plan.

capabilities.name: Frontend App Builder
capabilities.use_when: Use for building new frontend apps, dashboards, games, creative websites, or redesigns.
avoid_when: Do not use for plain documents, slide decks, or simple explanations.

capabilities.name: Frontend Testing and Debugging
capabilities.use_when: Use for testing or debugging rendered frontend apps, console errors, responsive issues, and UI regressions.
avoid_when: Do not use before any rendered frontend target exists.
examples: Check this page in the browser.

capabilities.name: Documents
capabilities.use_when: Use for creating, editing, redlining, rendering, or verifying Word/DOCX documents.
avoid_when: Do not use when final output is a slide deck, spreadsheet, or web app.
examples: Edit this DOCX and render it.

capabilities.name: Spreadsheets
capabilities.use_when: Use for creating, editing, analyzing, visualizing, or validating spreadsheet files.
avoid_when: Do not use for prose-only summaries unless a spreadsheet is the final artifact.
examples: Create an Excel workbook with formulas.

capabilities.name: Presentations
capabilities.use_when: Use for creating, editing, rendering, verifying, or exporting slide decks and PPTX files.
avoid_when: Do not use for simple prose outlines unless the final deliverable is slides.
examples: Turn this PDF into a PPT.

capabilities.name: PDF
capabilities.use_when: Use for reading, creating, rendering, extracting, or visually reviewing PDF files.
avoid_when: Do not use as primary when PDF is only an input to a slide deck or spreadsheet deliverable.
examples: Render this PDF and inspect pages.

capabilities.name: Image Generation
capabilities.use_when: Use for generating or editing bitmap images, illustrations, sprites, mockups, or visual variants.
avoid_when: Do not use for code-native SVG or existing icon-system edits unless bitmap output is needed.

capabilities.name: GitHub
capabilities.use_when: Use when the user references GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, reviews, or CI.
avoid_when: Do not use for local-only git work unless the user asks for remote GitHub context.

capabilities.name: Gmail
capabilities.use_when: Use when the user asks to search, summarize, draft, forward, label, archive, or triage Gmail messages.
avoid_when: Do not use when the user provides local email exports or only wants generic writing help.
examples: Find recent emails about this client.

capabilities.name: Google Drive
capabilities.use_when: Use when the user asks to find, fetch, edit, organize, export, or summarize Drive/Docs/Sheets/Slides files.
avoid_when: Do not use when files are local unless the user explicitly names Google Drive.

capabilities.name: Canva
capabilities.use_when: Use when the user asks to create, edit, translate, resize, or inspect Canva designs.
avoid_when: Do not use for local bitmap generation unless Canva output is requested.
